telegram.panels.settings.messages.change: Another message change is already in progress
Send the new message to use for the new addons
Send the new message to use for the updated addons

NOTE: You must reply to this message otherwise you will get ignored.
Avaible Platforms: modrinth and curseforge. Avaible Variables:
{{PLATFORM/name}}: Name of the mod. {{PLATFORM/authors}}: Name of the creators of the mod. {{PLATFORM/authorsUrl}}: Link to the profiles of the creators of the mod. {{PLATFORM/version}}: Latest version in the versions list. {{PLATFORM/versions}}: List of the versions supported by mod. {{PLATFORM/modloaders}}: Lista of the modloaders supported by mod. {{PLATFORM/categories}}: List of the categories of the mod. {{PLATFORM/description}}: Description of the mod. {{PLATFORM/created}}: Creation date of the mod. {{PLATFORM/modified}}: Modification date of the mod. {{PLATFORM/color}}: Color of the mod. {{PLATFORM/follows}}: Amount of people who follow the mod. {{PLATFORM/downloads}}: Amount of downloads of the mod. {{PLATFORM/icon}}: Icon of the mod. {{PLATFORM/license}}: The licence of the mod. {{PLATFORM/clientSide}}: Whether the mod is required on the client. {{PLATFORM/serverSide}}: Whether the mod is required on the server. {{PLATFORM/slug}}: The ID of the mod. {{PLATFORM/createVersion}}: The Create version supported by the mod. {{platforms}}: List of the platforms where the mod is avaible. example: Name on Modrinth: {{modrinth/name}}, Name on Curseforge: {{curseforge/name}}
Conditional Variables:
{{?variable:true|false?}} example: {{?curseforge:The name on curseforge is {{curseforge/name}}|The mod is not avaible on curseforge?}} Sends "The name on curseforge is (name)" if the variable "curseforge/name" exists, otherwise sends "The mod is not avaible on curseforge". {{?curseforge/authors:The creators on curseforge are {{authors}}|?}} Sends "The creators on curseforge are (names)" if the variable "name" exists, otherwise doesn't send anything.
Send cancel to cancel the new addon message update.

NOTE: You must reply to this message otherwise you will get ignored.
Avaible Platforms: modrinth and curseforge. Avaible versions: old (before the update) and new (after the update). Avaible Variables (none of those variables is always present):
{{names/PLATFORM}}: The name of the addon on the platform. {{PLATFORM/name/VERSION}}: New/old name of the mod (if the name did not change, this variable will not be avaible and you will have to use {{names/PLATFORM}}). {{PLATFORM/authors/VERSION}}*: New/old name dei creators of the mod. {{PLATFORM/authorsUrl/VERSION}}*: New/old link to the profiles of the creators of the mod. {{PLATFORM/version/VERSION}}: New/old latest version in the versions list. {{PLATFORM/versions/VERSION}}*: New/old list of the versions supported by the mod. {{PLATFORM/modloaders/VERSION}}*: New/old lista dei modloader supportati dalla mod. {{PLATFORM/categories/VERSION}}*: New/old list of the cateogires of the mod. {{PLATFORM/description/VERSION}}: New/old description of the mod. {{PLATFORM/created/VERSION}}: New/old creation date of the mod. {{PLATFORM/modified/VERSION}}: New/old modification date of the mod. {{PLATFORM/color/VERSION}}: New/old color of the mod. {{PLATFORM/follows/VERSION}}: New/old amount of people who follow mod. {{PLATFORM/downloads/VERSION}}: New/old amount of downloads of the mod. {{PLATFORM/icon/VERSION}}: New/old icon of the mod. {{PLATFORM/license/VERSION}}: New/old licence of the mod. {{PLATFORM/clientSide/VERSION}}: Whether the mod was/is required on the client. {{PLATFORM/serverSide/VERSION}}: Whether the mod was/is required on the server. {{PLATFORM/slug/VERSION}}: New/old ID of the mod. {{PLATFORM/createVersion/VERSION}}: New/old Create version supported by the mod. {{platforms*}}: >New/old List of the platforms where the mod is avaible. *: The versions of those mods also inclues added (added compared to the previous version) e removed (removed compared to the previous version).
Conditional Variables:
{{?variable:true|false?}} example: {{?curseforge/name/old:The old name on curseforge is {{curseforge/name/old}}, the new curseforge name is {{curseforge/name/new}}|The name didn't change?}} Sends "the new curseforge name is (name vecchio)" if the variable "curseforge/name/old" exists, otherwise sends "The name didn't change". {{?modrinth/authors/new:The modrinth authors are {{modrinth/authors/new}}|?}} Sends "The modrinth authors are (names)" if the variable "modrinth/authors" esiste, otherwise doesn't send anything.
Send cancel to cancel the updated addon message update.
You updated the message for the new addons
You updated the message for the updated addons

The updated addon message change has been cancelled

telegram.commands.settings.messages.succ: Settings for the Create addons notifications
telegram.commands.start.messages.success: Welcome! This bot will allow you to receive notification when an addon for the Minecraft mod "Create" gets updated or created. My commands are: - /setchannel - Sets the channel where to send addon notifications. - /settings - Manage the settings of the bot. - /preview [new|update] (raw) NOTE: [] = required, () = optional, | = OR Made by @Stef_DP and published on GitHub. The bot is also available on {{link_start}}Discord{{link_end}}.
telegram.commands.preview.messages.notCo: This chat has not been configured for the addons notifications
telegram.commands.preview.messages.inval: You must specify a message between "new" (new addon) or "update" (updated addon)
